value.body:
## Context

Agent behavior needs to vary by repository: provider availability, worktree location, authority mode, network/tool permissions, and follow-up ticket policy.

## Outcome

Repository settings expose agent work configuration that is persisted, validated, and enforced by the backend task runtime.

## Acceptance criteria

- Settings cover enabled providers, default provider, authority mode, worktree base path, concurrency, and follow-up ticket behavior.
- Invalid or unavailable provider settings show actionable diagnostics.
- Backend enforces repository settings when creating or running tasks.
- Defaults preserve current behavior for existing repositories.
- Tests cover schema validation, settings persistence, and runtime enforcement.

frontmatter.title: Add repository-scoped agent work settings and safety policies

value.title: Add repository-scoped agent work settings and safety policies
